'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=GNiNQ0qeTfPWB3vPE7gCcCOiSyO9gaI2U4agONKdYKM-1775788917-1.0.1.1-CJ_pSIr6IYk9dy5uC25bhd6nhltHQ0NaaekH2qxWaUo"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
